mutation: composite: prize-collecting selective pickup-and-delivery single-vehicle tour under a LIFO (single-ended rack, stack) loading constraint with bounded rack height -- choose which precedence-constrained requests to serve and order events so deliveries pop only the top tote, minimizing travel plus skip penalties
title: Single-Rack LIFO Picking Robot: Selective Tote Retrieval Tour
strategies: serve-nobody baseline: output an empty tour, cost = total penalty (calibration point)
standalone-benefit greedy: serve requests whose penalty exceeds their solo dock round-trip cost, emitted as consecutive depth-1 pick/deliver pairs

nearest-neighbor stack construction: build the tour event-by-event choosing the cheapest legal move (pick up any not-yet-picked served request while rack has room, or deliver the current top tote), naturally batching nearby pickups under LIFO
selection + LIFO-aware local search: alternate re-selecting the served subset and re-routing (reorder/reinsert nested request intervals) to trade travel against skipped-request penalties
